title: pinus mugo var. pumilio
intro: Pinus mugo var. pumilio, also known as dwarf mountain pine or Pygmy Mountain Pine, is a dwarf variety of the mountain pine tree (Pinus mugo) native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Pinus mugo var. pumilio include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Pinus mugo var. pumilio can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies such as tinctures and salves.
